Service is for registered UTSC students only.  Not for the public.

properties.ORGANIZATION_ADDRESS: Bay Centre for Birth Control, 790 Bay St, 8th Fl, Toronto, ON     M5G 1N8
properties.DESCRIPTION_SERVICE:
Peer-to-peer education -- in-person information on sexual and reproductive health issues including birth control options, emergency contraception, fertility awareness, pregnancy options including abortion, healthy sexuality and relationships, sexually transmitted infections, HIV/AIDS, safer sex practices * free condoms * provided by trained volunteers * call for appointment

Check IT Out, www.check-it-out.ca -- drop-in program providing pap tests only * for lesbian, bisexual, queer or gay women, and any other women who have sex with women * no appointment necessary * no Ontario Health Insurance required * female clinicians * online information on pap tests, human papillomavirus (HPV), cervical cancer

Also Mobile Health Unit (MHU) and sexual health workshops provided to women's shelters
properties.ACCESSIBILITY: Wheelchair accessible automatic main entrance ; Easy access to elevator ; Barrier-free washroom including door and stall ; Underground parking
properties.HOURS: Peer-to-peer education -- Tue-Thu 5 pm-8 pm, Sat 9:30 am-12:30 pm * Check It Out -- Wed 4 pm-7:30 pm

properties.ORGANIZATION_ADDRESS: 2340 Dundas St W, Toronto, ON     M6P 4A9
properties.ELIGIBILITY: People who need sexual health services
properties.DESCRIPTION_SERVICE:
Sexual health clinic * health professionals test for and treat sexually transmitted infections * family planning services
  • birth control counselling
  • low-cost or free birth control
  • emergency birth control
  • pregnancy testing and counselling
  • sexual health information and counselling
  • sexuality and relationship counselling
  • Pap smears
  • breast exams
  • rapid HIV testing
properties.APPLICATION: Call or drop-in * no referral required
properties.ACCESSIBILITY: Fully Accessible
properties.HOURS: Mon 9:30am-12noon, 2pm-6:30pm * Tue 1pm-5:30pm * Wed 9:30am-11:30am, 1pm-3:30pm * Thu 12noon-4pm * Fri 9:30am-12noon

properties.ORGANIZATION_ADDRESS: 2425 Bloor St W, Ste 403, Toronto, ON     M6S 4W4
properties.ELIGIBILITY: No restrictions
properties.DESCRIPTION_SERVICE: Abortion services up to 14 weeks gestation * pre-abortion and birth control counselling, and follow-up * all female staff * parental consent not required
properties.APPLICATION: Call for information or to make an appointment
properties.ACCESSIBILITY: Fully Accessible
properties.HOURS: Mon-Wed, Fri-Sat 9 am-6 pm * walk-in service available most mornings * call first to confirm
